name: Beijing Topnew Info & Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Topnew Info & Tech Co., Ltd. provides Internet data center services, Internet access services, and related value-added services. Its cloud services include Internet access, cloud computing, and cloud video conference services; IT services comprise configuration center and speed WAN services; and network Shield security management systems. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
